summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Student Wallet System with marketing bonus credits. All backend APIs (12/12 tests passed) and frontend features are working correctly. Package structure is correct: RM100→9 credits (8 paid + 1 bonus), RM300→27 credits (24 paid + 3 bonus), RM500→46 credits (40 paid + 6 bonus). Wallet correctly separates paid and bonus credits, transaction history shows correct types (topup_paid, topup_bonus), and bonus credit expiry (12 months) is properly tracked.
seed_data_creation: Created test student user with session for wallet testing. Performed one top-up with Starter Pack (RM100) resulting in 8 paid + 1 bonus = 9 total credits.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wallet system fully tested and working. Key findings: 1) All package structures are correct (RM100→9, RM300→27, RM500→46), 2) Paid and bonus credits are tracked separately in wallet, 3) Transaction history correctly shows topup_paid and topup_bonus transaction types, 4) Bonus credit batches have expiry dates set to 12 months from issuance, 5) Frontend correctly displays paid/bonus breakdown in balance card, packages, and top-up modal, 6) Stripe payment is MOCKED - confirmTopup immediately confirms without real Stripe integration.
